description_long: This bird features a predominantly pink body with dark gray accents on its wings and tail feathers, creating a striking contrast. Its wings are broad and outstretched, displaying layered feather details with a scalloped pattern along the edges. The head is rounded with a prominent, slightly curved beak and large, expressive blue eyes. A distinctive white, spherical crest sits atop its head, and a white swirl pattern decorates the side of its face. The legs are thin and pink, ending in three forward-facing toes and one backward-facing toe, each tipped with small claws. The tail is fan-shaped with alternating pink and gray bands, giving it a decorative, layered appearance.
description: A stylized pink bird with broad, dark-edged wings, a white crest, and a fan-shaped tail with gray bands.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bird's outstretched wings, rounded head with white crest, blue eyes, and pink beak.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the curved beak, white swirl on the face, and the layered tail feathers.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full spread of the wings and the fan-shaped, banded tail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the beak, crest, and feather layering.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid pink body with dark gray bands and scalloped edges on wings and tail, white crest and facial swirl
